description: One-way sync: master course → Canvas Blueprint course. Python-driven, no LLM analysis.

excluded: due_at, lock_at, unlock_at (dates stay out — set per semester)
NewQuiz content (LTI API, not accessible via REST)
ExternalTool, ExternalUrl, SubHeader (metadata only, no body to sync)
Files and media (images referenced by URL, not copied)

homepage.note: page_url for front page is typically 'front-page' or the course homepage slug

pages.note: page_url is the slug, not the canvas ID. Fetched during --pull.

assignments.note: Do NOT include due_at, lock_at, unlock_at — dates are semester-specific

quizzes.note: Classic quizzes only. NewQuiz (external_tool submission type) cannot be updated via REST API.

modules.note: Used during --pull to discover blueprint canvas IDs. Module structure is not synced.

blueprint_index_schema.description: Stored at .canvas/blueprint_index.json. Maps master filepaths to blueprint canvas IDs.

fields.blueprint_course_id: Canvas course ID of the blueprint (from BLUEPRINT_COURSE_ID env)
fields.master_course_id: Canvas course ID of the master (from CANVAS_COURSE_ID env)
unmapped_master: list of master filepaths with no blueprint match
unmapped_blueprint: list of blueprint item titles with no master match

implementation.matching_strategy: Title-based: blueprint item titles are matched to master item titles (case-insensitive, exact). Rebuild mapping with --pull whenever titles change in either course.

pre_push_checklist: canvas_sync.py --status returns 'Nothing to push' (master fully synced)
blueprint_sync.py --status shows >80% of master items mapped
unmapped_master list reviewed — any unmapped Pages or Assignments investigated
No active student cohort mid-semester using this Blueprint (or content locking is acceptable)
post_push_spot_check: Open 2 random pages in Blueprint → Student View → confirm content matches master
Blueprint Settings → Course Details: grading scheme = BYU-Idaho Standard
Blueprint homepage shows updated content (hard-refresh if cached)
Blueprint Syllabus tab shows updated content

success_criteria.pushed_count: All mapped Pages, Assignments, Discussions, classic Quizzes pushed without FAILED lines
success_criteria.settings: late_policy, grading_standard, announcements all return OK

known_failures.cause: Blueprint page_url changed because title was edited in Canvas UI
known_failures.fix: Re-run --pull to refresh the mapping, then --push again

known_failures.cause: API token belongs to instructor account without write access to Blueprint course
known_failures.fix: Blueprint courses sometimes require admin token. Ask Canvas admin to grant instructor access to the Blueprint course, or use admin token.

known_failures.scenario: late_policy PATCH returns 200 but setting unchanged
known_failures.fix: Contact Canvas admin to allow course-level late policy override

known_failures.cause: Blueprint titles don't match master titles (renamed in one course but not the other)
known_failures.fix: Check unmapped_master in blueprint_index.json. Rename items in Blueprint Canvas UI to match master titles, then re-pull.

fallbacks.unmapped_items: Skipped silently — logged in --status output. Does not block other items from pushing.
fallbacks.api_failure_on_item: Logs FAILED with error text, continues to next item. Does not abort the run.
fallbacks.missing_blueprint_index: Aborts with clear error: 'Run blueprint_sync.py --pull first'

safety_boundaries.never_read_from_blueprint: Blueprint content is never used as source of truth
safety_boundaries.human_in_the_loop: Agent shows --status coverage before --push and waits for confirmation

related_agents.name: canvas_semester_setup
related_agents.role: Sets due dates in each new course section created from Blueprint

related_agents.name: canvas_content_sync
related_agents.role: Pushes individual content changes to master course

related_files.role: Python implementation — source of truth for all sync behavior
master filepath → blueprint canvas ID mapping (gitignored)
Append-only audit trail of all blueprint pushes (gitignored)
Master course sync — must be run and clean before blueprint sync
